# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security


variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive
  GIT_DEPTH: 0

before_script:
  - 'which ssh-agent || (apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y)'
  - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
  - ssh-add <(echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY")
  - git config --global url."https://gitlab-ci-token:$CI_JOB_TOKEN@gitlab.com/".insteadOf "https://gitlab.com/"
  - git config --global user.email "ci@company.com"
  - git config --global user.name "GitLab CI"

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building with MR title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Building with MR description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Building with commit message: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
    - echo "Building with commit author: $CI_COMMIT_AUTHOR"
    - echo "Building with commit SHA: $CI_COMMIT_SHA"
    - echo "Building with branch: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH"
    - echo "Building with tag: $CI_COMMIT_TAG"
    - echo "Building with pipeline ID: $CI_PIPELINE_ID"
    - echo "Building with job ID: $CI_JOB_ID"
    - echo "Building with project ID: $CI_PROJECT_ID"
    - echo "Building with project name: $CI_PROJECT_NAME"
    - echo "Building with project path: $CI_PROJECT_PATH"
    - echo "Building with project URL: $CI_PROJECT_URL"
    - echo "Building with merge request ID: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_ID"
    - echo "Building with merge request IID: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH"
    - echo "Building with merge request source project ID: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_PROJECT_ID"
    - echo "Building with merge request target project ID: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_PROJECT_ID"
    - echo "Building with merge request source project path: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_PROJECT_PATH"
    - echo "Building with merge request target project path: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_PROJECT_PATH"
    - echo "Building with merge request source project URL: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_PROJECT_URL"
    - echo "Building with merge request target project URL: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_PROJECT_URL"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch URL: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_URL"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch URL: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_URL"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit SHA: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_SHA"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch commit SHA: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_COMMIT_SHA"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit message: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch commit message: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit author: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_AUTHOR"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch commit author: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_COMMIT_AUTHOR"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit date: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_DATE"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch commit date: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_COMMIT_DATE"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit URL: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_URL"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch commit URL: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_COMMIT_URL"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit status: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch commit status: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit status URL: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_URL"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch commit status URL: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_URL"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit status description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch commit status description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit status context: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_CONTEXT"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch commit status context: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_CONTEXT"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit status target URL: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_TARGET_URL"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch commit status target URL: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_TARGET_URL"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit status target URL description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_TARGET_URL_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch commit status target URL description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_TARGET_URL_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit status target URL context: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_TARGET_URL_CONTEXT"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch commit status target URL context: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_TARGET_URL_CONTEXT"
    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit status target URL context description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_TARGET_URL_CONTEXT_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Building with merge request target branch commit status target URL context description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_TARGET_URL_CONTEXT_DESCRIPTION"

    - echo "Building with merge request source branch commit status target URL context description URL description URL description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_COMMIT_STATUS_TARGET_URL_CONTEXT_DESCRIPTION_URL_DESCRIPTION_URL_DESCRIPTION"
